name: ttcut
description: Local table-tennis rally cutter for Windows
author: weiye

scripts.package: node scripts/stage-worker.mjs && node scripts/generate-release-metadata.mjs && electron-forge package --arch=x64
scripts.make: node scripts/stage-worker.mjs && node scripts/generate-release-metadata.mjs && node scripts/make.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/stage-worker.mjs && node scripts/generate-release-metadata.mjs && electron-forge package --arch=x64 && playwright test --config=playwright.electron.config.ts
scripts.verify:release: node scripts/stage-worker.mjs && node scripts/generate-release-metadata.mjs && electron-forge package --arch=x64 && node scripts/verify-release.mjs
